title: Phase 1 builder golden gate completion checkpoint
problem: ticket-031 completes safety-critical and MVP builder gate coverage entries, but several Phase 1 golden tests (e.g. contradiction detection, research queue, public site static render) are not yet mapped in REQUIRED_GOLDEN_AREAS and no completion checkpoint documents the intentional omissions.
acceptance_criteria: Document which remaining golden tests are intentionally outside REQUIRED_GOLDEN_AREAS and why.
Add any missing merge-critical areas to REQUIRED_GOLDEN_AREAS if audit finds gaps (contradiction_detection, research_queue, public_site_static_render candidates).
non_goals: Do not change runtime pipeline behavior.
Do not add Ollama or live discovery.
